ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Sweet pepper, green, yellow or red, raw
Courgette or zucchini, pulp and peel, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: poivrons 30%, aubergines 30%, courgettes 30%, sauce ( oignons, al tomates huile de tournesol, thym, sel, poivre) 10%
